repos.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
features: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
**Paste a reference video**
**The agent analyzes transcript, pacing, scenes, keyframes, and style**
**You get 2-3 differentiated concepts, an honest tool path, cost estimates, and a sample before full production**
**What it keeps** from the reference: pacing, hook style, structure, tone
**What it changes**: topic, visual treatment, angle, narration approach
repos.readme_excerpt:

Follow The Build

repos.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
features: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
**Library** ‚ÄĒ `compress(messages)` in Python or TypeScript, inline in any app
**Proxy** ‚ÄĒ `headroom proxy --port 8787`, zero code changes, any language
**Agent wrap** ‚ÄĒ `headroom wrap claude|codex|cursor|aider|copilot` in one command
**MCP server** ‚ÄĒ `headroom_compress`, `headroom_retrieve`, `headroom_stats` for any MCP client
**Cross-agent memory** ‚ÄĒ shared store across Claude, Codex, Gemini, auto-dedup

repos.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
features: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
**500+ curated news feeds** across 15 categories, AI-synthesized into briefs
**Dual map engine** ‚ÄĒ 3D globe (globe.gl) and WebGL flat map (deck.gl) with 56 map layer types
**Cross-stream correlation** ‚ÄĒ military, economic, disaster, and escalation signal convergence
**Country Instability Index (CII)** ‚ÄĒ server-authoritative CII v8 stress scoring for 31 Tier-1 countries
**Finance radar** ‚ÄĒ 29 stock exchanges, commodities, crypto, and 7-signal market composite

repos.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
features: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
We strongly recommend using Doubao-Seed-2.0-Code, DeepSeek v3.2 and Kimi 2.5 to run DeerFlow
Learn moreÔľąhttps://www.byteplus.com/en/activity/codingplan?utm_campaign=deer_flow&utm_content=deer_flow&utm_medium=devrel&utm_source=OWO&utm_term=deer_flowÔľČ
